user_claim: Customer: Hi, I found new damage on my car after it was parked outside overnight. | Support: Sorry to hear that. Can you describe what changed? | Customer: The back of the car has a dent now. It was not there before. | Support: Did anything else break or is it mostly body damage? | Customer: Mostly the rear bumper area. I attached the photo I took this morning.
evidence_standard_met_reason: Evidence standard met. Requirement: The claimed object and relevant part should be visible clearly enough to inspect the claimed condition.
claim_status_justification: The claim is supported based on visual evidence in img_1, which clearly shows a dent on the rear bumper of the car. The aggregated findings confirm a medium-severity dent on the rear bumper, consistent with the reported issue. The claimant's low-risk history with prior accepted car damage claims further supports the legitimacy of this submission.

user_claim: Customer: Parking lot mein meri car ko scrape lag gaya. | Support: Aap kis type ka damage report karna chahte hain? | Customer: Front side par mark aa gaya hai, bumper ke upar. | Support: Light damage hai ya body par scratch? | Customer: Light theek hai, front bumper par scratch hai. evidence_standard_met_reason: Evidence standard met. Requirement: The claimed object and relevant part should be visible clearly enough to inspect the claimed condition.
claim_status_justification: Visual evidence from img_1 shows a broken front bumper on the claimed vehicle, which directly contradicts the claim of a scratch. Because the inspected condition does not match the claimed issue type, the claim is flagged as contradicted and cannot be accepted as submitted.

user_claim: Customer: I want to file this as bumper damage. | Support: Can you tell me what happened? | Customer: The car was tapped from behind and now the back looks damaged. | Support: Are you asking for review of the rear side? | Customer: Yes, the back bumper. user_claim: Customer: Hi, I am not fully sure how to explain this because I noticed it only after reaching home. | Support: No problem, please tell me what happened. | Customer: There was a small bump earlier, nothing major, and I first thought everything was fine. Later I looked at the car again because my family member said the front area looked different. | Support: Are you reporting a general vehicle issue or a specific damaged part? | Customer: I was confused at first because I checked the side and the front and walked around the car a few times. I do not want to claim the wrong thing. | Support: That is okay. What part do you want reviewed? | Customer: After checking again, I think the issue is with the headlight. It looks like the headlight may be cracked, so please review that part.
evidence_standard_met_reason: The submitted images do not clearly show the claimed object or part.
claim_status_justification: The claim cannot be verified because the submitted images do not clearly show the car's headlight or any visible crack, with risk flags of damage_not_visible and low_light_or_glare further reducing image clarity. No supporting images were provided to corroborate the reported damage. As a result, there is not enough information to confirm or deny the claimed headlight crack.

user_claim: Customer: There is a dent along the side of my car. | Support: When did you notice it? | Customer: This morning, after the car had been parked near the gate. | Support: Is it near the front or back? | Customer: It is on the door panel area. I attached two photos from different distances.
evidence_standard_met_reason: All submitted images are cropped or blurry and cannot be used to evaluate the claim.
claim_status_justification: The claim involves a dent on a car door, but the sole supporting image (img_2) is blurry and cropped, preventing clear evaluation of the alleged damage. Without a sharp, unobstructed view of the affected area, the evidence standard cannot be met. Additional clear photographs of the door are needed to verify the claim.

user_claim: Customer: I picked up my car after service and noticed a mark on the hood. | Support: What kind of mark is it? | Customer: It looks like a scratch across the top panel. | Support: Do you think it happened during service? | Customer: Yes, that is why I am asking for review. evidence_standard_met_reason: Evidence standard met. Requirement: The claimed object and relevant part should be visible clearly enough to inspect the claimed condition.
claim_status_justification: The claim is contradicted because the image (img_1) of the vehicle's hood reveals a dent, not the scratch reported by the claimant. Since the actual damage type does not match the claimed issue, the claim cannot be validated as submitted. Additionally, manual review is recommended given the prior history of image-quality concerns and the non-original image flag.
